description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden cabinet or low shelf, featuring a scalloped, dark wood top and a lighter painted body. The front side displays three drawers with ornate handles and three open shelf compartments beneath, all framed by decorative carved details and curved legs. The back is plain and finished in a darker wood tone, lacking any openings or decorative features. The sides are simple, with subtle paneling and the same light paint as the front. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The overall design suggests a blend of rustic and classic French influences, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A vintage-style wooden cabinet with a scalloped dark wood top, three drawers, and open shelves, featuring ornate handles and decorative legs. The body is painted a light color, with a plain wooden back and subtly paneled sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with ornate handles, three open shelves, and decorative carved details on the legs and lower edge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the scalloped dark wood top, light painted side panel, and curved leg design.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain, darker wood finish with no openings or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the scalloped top and light painted side panel.
